description: Conflicts between the designer-authored token system and production-extracted values. Each ticket is an actionable gap for engineering.

tickets.title: Status color: Success
tickets.action: Engineering to update success color to #00B67A across all surfaces.

tickets.title: Status color: Error
tickets.action: Engineering to update error color to #FF5C5C across all surfaces.

tickets.title: Status color: Info
tickets.action: Engineering to update info color to #33CCFF. Note: #0d47a1 flagged previously as Material Blue 900 library leak — this confirms it should be replaced.

tickets.title: Status color: Warning
tickets.action: Engineering to add #FF7C35 as warning color. No close match exists in production.

tickets.title: Brand primary color — four-way conflict
tickets.action: Block all other token work until resolved. This is the foundation everything builds on.
tickets.notes: Four distinct purples shipping simultaneously. Designer DS: #722ED1 (Royal Amethyst, 6 files in dashboard). Production Figma canonical: #4e3bc2 (173 files, $primary-color). Feed repo de facto: #6651e4 (25 files, $inprogress-state). Typo variant: #4d3bc2 (46 files, ΔE≈0.5 from #4e3bc2, visually identical but semantically wrong — see DC-008). Note: #722ED1 is NOT aspirational — it is already shipping in production (year-in-review, learn page header, FeedLayout). Brand team must pick one canonical. Everything else is drift.

tickets.title: Icon system not implemented
tickets.designerValue: 1,208 SVG icons across 22 categories (line + fill variants)
tickets.action: Engineering to replace image-based icons with SVG icon system. Migrate to lucide-react or custom SVG sprite using designer's icon library as source. Multi-sprint engineering effort.

tickets.title: Typography scale gap
tickets.action: Resolved — added font/heading/sm (24px), font/heading/md (32px), font/heading/lg (40px), font/heading/xl (56px) to canonical via manual-canonicals.json. Engineering: ensure Nunito loads correctly at these sizes.

tickets.title: Brand primary typo — #4d3bc2 shipping in 46 files
tickets.action: Engineering to find-replace #4d3bc2 with #4e3bc2 across student dashboard repo. No design decision needed — this is a typo, not an intentional variant. 46 files, ~80 occurrences.
tickets.notes: Invisible to the human eye (ΔE 0.5) but wrong in every computed style. Will cause confusion once CSS variables are introduced. Fix before codemod runs. Source-code evidence in docs/repo-analysis-student-dashboard.md.

tickets.title: Progress success color not in ledger
tickets.action: Engineering to update progress completed fill to #00B67A (color/success/500). Also used as $success-green and $completed-state in dashboard _variables.scss.
tickets.notes: DC-001 addresses the global success color. This is the component-specific instance on ProgressBar. Both should resolve together when DC-001 ships.

tickets.title: Paused state color not in ledger
tickets.action: Design team to decide: add #3b9af5 as color/info/600 or map to nearest existing info token. Used for ProgressBar paused variant and $paused-state in dashboard _variables.scss.
tickets.notes: No designer equivalent defined yet. Needs design decision before engineering can standardize.
